overrides.expect: \begin{array}{l} D (\mathbf {v} _ {1}, \ldots , \underset {j} {\mathbf {v}} _ {j}, \ldots , \underset {k} {\mathbf {v}} _ {k}, \ldots , \mathbf {v} _ {n}) = \\ \quad = D (\mathbf {v} _ {1}, \ldots , \underset {j} {\mathbf {v}} _ {j}, \ldots , \underbrace {\mathbf {v} _ {k} - \mathbf {v} _ {j}} _ {k}, \ldots , \mathbf {v} _ {n}) \\ \quad = D (\mathbf {v} _ {1}, \ldots , \underbrace {\mathbf {v} _ {j} + (\mathbf {v} _ {k} - \mathbf {v} _ {j})} _ {j}, \ldots , \underbrace {\mathbf {v} _ {k} - \mathbf {v} _ {j}} _ {k}, \ldots , \mathbf {v} _ {n}) \\ \quad = D (\mathbf {v} _ {1}, \ldots , \underset {j} {\mathbf {v}} _ {k}, \ldots , \underbrace {\mathbf {v} _ {k} - \mathbf {v} _ {j}} _ {k}, \ldots , \mathbf {v} _ {n}) \\ \quad = D (\mathbf {v} _ {1}, \ldots , \underset {j} {\mathbf {v}} _ {k}, \ldots , \underbrace {(\mathbf {v} _ {k} - \mathbf {v} _ {j}) - \mathbf {v} _ {k}} _ {k}, \ldots , \mathbf {v} _ {n}) \\ \quad = D (\mathbf {v} _ {1}, \ldots , \underset {j} {\mathbf {v}} _ {k}, \ldots , - \underset {k} {\mathbf {v}} _ {j}, \ldots , \mathbf {v} _ {n}) \\ \quad = - D (\mathbf {v} _ {1}, \ldots , \underset {j} {\mathbf {v}} _ {k}, \ldots , \underset {k} {\mathbf {v}} _ {j}, \ldots , \mathbf {v} _ {n}). \end{array}
overrides.new: \begin{array}{l} D (\mathbf {v} _ {1}, \ldots , {\underset {j} {\mathbf {v}}} _ {j}, \ldots , {\underset {k} {\mathbf {v}}} _ {k}, \ldots , \mathbf {v} _ {n}) = \\ \quad = D (\mathbf {v} _ {1}, \ldots , {\underset {j} {\mathbf {v}}} _ {j}, \ldots , \underbrace {\mathbf {v} _ {k} - \mathbf {v} _ {j}} _ {k}, \ldots , \mathbf {v} _ {n}) \\ \quad = D (\mathbf {v} _ {1}, \ldots , \underbrace {\mathbf {v} _ {j} + (\mathbf {v} _ {k} - \mathbf {v} _ {j})} _ {j}, \ldots , \underbrace {\mathbf {v} _ {k} - \mathbf {v} _ {j}} _ {k}, \ldots , \mathbf {v} _ {n}) \\ \quad = D (\mathbf {v} _ {1}, \ldots , {\underset {j} {\mathbf {v}}} _ {k}, \ldots , \underbrace {\mathbf {v} _ {k} - \mathbf {v} _ {j}} _ {k}, \ldots , \mathbf {v} _ {n}) \\ \quad = D (\mathbf {v} _ {1}, \ldots , {\underset {j} {\mathbf {v}}} _ {k}, \ldots , \underbrace {(\mathbf {v} _ {k} - \mathbf {v} _ {j}) - \mathbf {v} _ {k}} _ {k}, \ldots , \mathbf {v} _ {n}) \\ \quad = D (\mathbf {v} _ {1}, \ldots , {\underset {j} {\mathbf {v}}} _ {k}, \ldots , - {\underset {k} {\mathbf {v}}} _ {j}, \ldots , \mathbf {v} _ {n}) \\ \quad = - D (\mathbf {v} _ {1}, \ldots , {\underset {j} {\mathbf {v}}} _ {k}, \ldots , {\underset {k} {\mathbf {v}}} _ {j}, \ldots , \mathbf {v} _ {n}). \end{array}
